The '''Eclipse''' was a model of [[Sail barge/Legends|sail barge]] manufactured by [[Gefferon Pleasure Craft]]. It was unarmed and smaller than the [[Ubrikkian Industries/Legends|Ubrikkian Industries]] [[Luxury-class sail barge|Luxury sail barge]], but the interior was considered to be more luxurious for its smaller quantity of passengers, and add-on weapons were also produced.

{{Veh-stub}}
